1752680.name: Get Together Soundtrack
1752680.description:
This is the official soundtrack for Get Together: A Coop Adventure composed by Mathilde Hoffmann featuring 35 minutes of atmospheric music - ideal for puzzle solving, pondering or daydreaming. Relive the different worlds of Get Together in this specially for stand-alone listening remastered version.

Additional Cello recording by Sebastian Bach. Mastering by Grischa Kursawe.
